tools.name: neus_context
tools.description: Start here. Load the signed-in profile, available trust checks, and recommended workflow for this session.

tools.name: neus_verifiers_catalog
tools.description: List available trust checks, supported networks, and required inputs. Use this when a check needs details that are not already in the session context.

tools.name: neus_proofs_check
tools.description: Check whether existing trust receipts meet the requested requirements. This is read-only and never creates a receipt. Omit the wallet when signed in.

tools.name: neus_verify
tools.description: Create or refresh a trust receipt after checking that one is needed. Omit the wallet when signed in; the session authorizes the request.

tools.name: neus_verify_or_guide
tools.description: Reuse a qualifying trust receipt or return the one next step needed to complete the check. Omit the wallet when signed in.

tools.name: neus_proofs_get
tools.description: Read current trust receipt details for a wallet or DID, including titles, tags, status, and content. Omit the wallet when signed in.

tools.name: neus_me
tools.description: Refresh the signed-in profile or look up a public profile by wallet or DID.

tools.name: neus_agent_link
tools.description: Check whether a Trusted Agent has the identity and permission needed to act. Returns ready or one setup step.

tools.name: neus_agent_create
tools.description: Create or finish a Trusted Agent’s identity and permissions. Keep the same agentId and agentWallet on retries, follow the returned next step, then use neus_agent_link to confirm readiness.

tools.name: neus_agent_mount
tools.description: Connect agent context by loading a Trusted Agent’s identity, permissions, skills, and current settings.

tools.name: neus_secret_create
tools.description: Store a secret, such as an API key, as an encrypted record. Tools never return the saved value.

tools.name: neus_secret_list
tools.description: List saved secret names, types, and update times without exposing their values.

tools.name: neus_secret_revoke
tools.description: Revoke a saved secret so it can no longer be used.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "neus_secret_create" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Store a secret, such as an API key, as an encrypted record. Tools never return the saved value.
